calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Granted as unopposed.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40 am and concluding at 9:55 am

Plaintiff Align Technology Inc. is represented by David Cook, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Angela Abernathy not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

MARCO PADILLA is sworn to testify on behalf of the Plaintiff and testifies.

COURT FINDS:
1. The first amended complaint filed June 24, 2024 is the operative pleading.
2. The Defendant was served by Personal Service on August 30, 2024.
3. Default was entered against Defendant on October 7, 2024.
4. The Doe Defendants were dismissed on October 7, 2024.
5. The requested judgment will resolve the entire matter

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Align Technology Inc., and against Defendant Angela Abernathy aka Angela P Abernathy, DDS, as follows:

1. Damages: $38,957.16
2. Prejudgment Interest: $5,238.97
3. Costs: $691.80
4. Attorney fees: $1,000.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $45,887.93

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2024 Continued To Jan-29-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
